overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a foggy, rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through dense urban canyons with towering glass skyscrapers, passing under elevated highways and entering the Little China district. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, neon signage, and holographic dashboard displays characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach in downtown district

events.description: begins driving sequence departing from Wakako Okada location in heavy fog
slight right turn navigating through foggy conditions toward downtown

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic vehicle through foggy downtown streets with green holographic dashboard displays visible

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle dashboard with green holographic displays and steering wheel
tall glass and steel skyscrapers emerging from the fog on the right side
massive concrete elevated highway ramp structure on the left side
vertical red neon signage visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through heavy rain and fog. The dashboard displays green holographic interfaces while the vehicle approaches a cluster of glass skyscrapers on the right and passes an elevated highway structure on the left. The atmosphere is dense with fog limiting visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: Little China district entrance under elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: entering Little China district indicated by on-screen text notification
passing under large overpass structure temporarily blocking sky view
flying vehicle passes overhead between skyscrapers above the street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the district transition, passing under massive infrastructure while maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering between skyscrapers above the street at approximately 30s

entered.detail: on-screen text indicator marking the boundary of Little China district
large digital billboard displaying a fist symbol on the right side building
massive concrete overpass structure passing overhead spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the Little China district, passing under a massive overpass structure that temporarily blocks the sky. A flying car hovers overhead between buildings around the 30-second mark. The environment becomes more enclosed with large digital billboards visible on the right side, while the previous distant neon signage disappears from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with reflective glass facade towers

events.description: entering narrow corridor between massive glass buildings creating an urban canyon effect
slight steering adjustments navigating through the tight urban canyon

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow urban canyon with towering glass buildings on both sides, maintaining central lane position

entered.detail: massive glass facade skyscraper forming the left wall of the urban canyon with reflective windows
massive glass facade skyscraper forming the right wall of the urban canyon with grid-like window patterns
tall corporate building visible at the end of the canyon through the fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon flanked by massive glass facade towers on both sides, creating an enclosed corridor effect. The reflective glass buildings tower overhead with only a sliver of foggy sky visible above. The previous district signage and overpass structures have passed out of view, replaced by the imposing canyon walls that dominate the visual field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city that transitions from an open, foggy thoroughfare into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins inside a futuristic vehicle guided by green holographic dashboard interfaces, moving past glass skyscrapers and an elevated highway through dense, visibility-limiting fog. As the vehicle enters the Little China district, the scene shifts beneath a massive overpass that momentarily blocks the sky while a flying car hovers between buildings and large digital billboards emerge on the right. The environment then tightens as the vehicle leaves the district signage behind and enters a narrow corridor flanked by towering glass facades. Finally, the view is dominated by these imposing reflective walls, leaving only a sliver of foggy sky visible above the enclosed urban canyon.
